query:
SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  feedUrl,
  consecutiveErrors,
  errorCount,
  failureCount,
  LEFT(lastError, 120) as lastError,
  lastErrorAt,
  lastSuccessAt,
  quarantined,
  isActive
FROM rssSources
WHERE consecutiveErrors >= 3
   OR (failureCount > 5 AND (lastSuccessAt IS NULL OR lastSuccessAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)))
ORDER BY consecutiveErrors DESC, failureCount DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:

  quarantined,
  isActive
FROM rssSources
WHERE consecutiveErrors >= 3
   OR (failureCount > 5 AND (lastSuccessAt IS NULL OR lastSuccessAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)))
ORDER BY consecutiveErrors DESC, failureCount DESC
LIMIT 20;
